employeesPage.headline: HR & Workforce
employeesPage.subline: Employee lifecycle · Omanisation tracking · Payroll intelligence

workforce.noEmployeesYet: No employees in this workspace yet.

departmentsPage.title: Departments & Positions
departmentsPage.subtitle: Create and manage departments, assign heads, and define job positions.
departmentsPage.seedConfirmDesc: This creates up to {{count}} common departments (e.g. Human Resources, Finance, Sales). Names that already exist are skipped.

list.emptyHint: Add your first department to organise your team.

detail.noneSelectedHint: Click any department in the list to view its members and job roles.
detail.noPositionsHint: Add job roles to this department.

deptForm.newSubtitle: Define a new department for your organisation.
deptForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this department's role and responsibilities…
deptForm.head: Department head
deptForm.noEmployeesForHead: No employees yet — you can assign a head after adding staff.

assignDialog.title: Assign employees — {{department}}
assignDialog.subtitle: Select employees to add to this department.
assignDialog.allAssigned: Everyone is already in this department.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete “{{name}}”?
delete.deptExtra: Employees in this department will keep their profiles; their department field will be cleared.

attendance.title: Attendance Management
attendance.operationalControlDesc: Operational control center — live workforce state, approvals, and attendance records in one place.

setupHealth.title: Attendance setup incomplete
setupHealth.description: Some prerequisites are missing. Complete the steps below before attendance tracking will work correctly.
setupHealth.holidayTodayNote: Today is a public holiday — no attendance is expected.

blockers.no_active_employees: No active employees found. Add employees to get started.
blockers.no_employees_with_portal_access: No employees have portal access. Invite employees to enable self check-in.
blockers.no_attendance_sites: No attendance sites configured. Add at least one site with a QR code.
blockers.no_shift_templates: No shift templates defined. Create shift templates before assigning schedules.
blockers.no_schedules_today: No employee schedules are active today. Assign schedules to employees.

table.noAuditEntries: No audit entries for this range.

attendance.auditTrailDesc: Structural audit trail (last {{count}} rows for the selected filters). Open a row for before/after payloads and linked IDs.
attendance.operationalTriageDesc: Operational triage lens shows acknowledge, resolve, and assign audit entries. Issue kind filters the stable key on the triage payload; status and assignee match the current operational issue row when present.

signals.openCheckoutsNote: "Open check-outs past shift end" and "Missed shifts" are computed server-side using Muscat wall-clock shift boundaries, consistent with the live board.

todayBoard.selectCompany: Select a company in the workspace switcher to load today's live board.
todayBoard.fullDayTitle: Full day — same person, multiple shifts (Asia/Muscat)
todayBoard.minutesAttributed: · {{minutes}}m attributed (minutes clamped to each shift window)
todayBoard.openShiftsNote: · open or upcoming shifts show 0m until check-in.
todayBoard.noEmployeesScheduled: No employees scheduled today — assign schedules in Employee schedules, then refresh.
todayBoard.absentNote: Absent applies only after the shift ends with no check-in. Before that, you'll see upcoming, awaiting check-in, or late / no arrival.

clockInDialog.title: Add Manual Attendance Record
clockInDialog.description: Creates an HR attendance record on behalf of an employee. Requires a reason for audit purposes.
clockInDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Required for compliance — who asked for this entry, why, or evidence (min. 10 characters)…
clockInDialog.reasonHint: Stored on the record for audit. Use clear, factual wording.
clockInDialog.noEmployeesTooltip: No active employees available. Add employees first.
clockInDialog.noEmployeesHint: No active employees are available. Go to Employees to add or activate employees before recording attendance.
clockInDialog.weakReasonHint: Reason is too generic. Describe who requested this entry and why (e.g. 'Manager confirmed on-site — ID card log ref #1234').
clockInDialog.duplicateError: A manual attendance record already exists for this employee on this date. Edit the existing record instead.
clockInDialog.invalidTimeRange: Check-out time must be after check-in time. Overnight shifts are not supported for manual entries.
clockInDialog.payrollReviewNote: Manual records have no linked schedule. Payroll review may be needed for this entry.

editDialog.title: Edit HR attendance record
editDialog.auditNote: Audit note — why this change is justified *
editDialog.auditNotePlaceholder: Required when status or notes change (min. 10 characters). Who asked, what evidence, or policy basis…
editDialog.auditNoteHint: Stored on the audit log with this update.

corrections.selectCompany: Select a company to review correction requests.
corrections.provideRejectionReason: Please provide a reason for rejection

manualCheckins.selectCompany: Select a company to review manual check-in requests.

sitePunches.selectCompany: Select a company in the workspace switcher to load site punches.

chart.title: Weekly Attendance — {{month}}
chart.noData: No attendance data for this period
chart.noDataHint: Record attendance to see the chart

todaySummary.title: Today's HR attendance
todaySummary.legacyNote: HR attendance records for today. Live clock punches appear on Today's Board and in employee records.
todaySummary.noRowsHint: Use Add Attendance Record to add entries, or rely on self check-in and corrections.

table.title: Attendance Records — {{month}}
table.noRecordsHint: Start recording attendance using the button above

forceCheckoutDialog.title: Force checkout
forceCheckoutDialog.description: This closes the open attendance punch at the current time (Asia/Muscat wall clock). Checkout-at-shift-end is not offered here yet — it needs explicit payroll policy review before we stamp a synthetic end time. The employee is notified implicitly via their record; a full audit entry is stored.
forceCheckoutDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Why you are closing this session (compliance)…

acknowledgeDialog.title: Acknowledge issue
acknowledgeDialog.description: Marks this operational issue as acknowledged so the team knows it was triaged (does not approve requests or close punches by itself).
acknowledgeDialog.placeholder: Who is handling this, or context…

resolveDialog.title: Resolve issue
resolveDialog.description: Records resolution in the operational issue log (min. 3 characters). Use this when no further action is needed on the triage row.

assignDialog.title: Assign issue
assignDialog.description: Sends ownership to a user for follow-up. Optional note is stored on the assignment audit entry.
assignDialog.assigneeHint: Workspace admins, HR, finance, and reviewers. Employees without a login are not listed.

deleteDialog.title: Delete HR attendance row?
deleteDialog.description: This removes the legacy HR attendance record. Self-service clock rows and audit history are unchanged. This action is logged.

leave.title: Leave Management
leave.pageSubline: Annual leave, sick leave, Oman public holidays, and payroll records per Oman Labour Law
leave.endAfterStart: End date must be after start date
leave.selectDates: Please select start and end dates

performance.title: Performance Management
performance.growthSubline: Training, self-reviews, and KPI targets — per-employee
performance.pageSubtitle: Control layer for training, reviews, targets, and workforce intelligence — on top of existing HR data.

filters.periodHelp: Period for KPI snapshot and KPI leaderboard

performance.periodDesc: average KPI achievement (server) and the KPI leaderboard below use this month.
performance.allTimeDesc: training counts, self-review backlog and response rate, training spotlight, and department health — not filtered by the month control.

dashboard.loadError: Could not load HR performance dashboard
dashboard.loadErrorDesc: You may not have permission, or the server could not load data.
dashboard.trainingSpotlightDesc: Completed trainings and recent completions (server summary).
dashboard.deptTrainingHealthDesc: Share of completed assignments by department.
dashboard.noAchievementData: No achievement data for this period.

trainingTab.subtitle: Assign and track training — status, scores, and certification links are stored on each record.
trainingTab.noRecordsFiltered: No training records for this filter.

reviewsTab.selfSubtitle: Employee-submitted self reviews. HR / managers add ratings and feedback to close the loop.
reviewsTab.formalSubtitle: Structured performance reviews (scores, strengths, goals) stored in HR records.

targetsTab.teamProgressDesc: Targets vs achievement for the selected month.

insightsTab.subtitle: Connect operational data to decisions: use intelligence dashboards to spot risk, skill gaps, and ROI.
insightsTab.workforceDesc: Automations, risk flags, and workforce health signals.
insightsTab.hrOpsDesc: Company-wide HR and operations KPIs and automation health.

assignTrainingDialog.title: Assign training
assignTrainingDialog.description: Creates a training record for the selected employee (employee profile id).
assignTrainingDialog.validationError: Choose an employee and enter a title.

targetDialog.title: Assign KPI target
targetDialog.description: Uses the same engine as KPI & Performance — notifies the employee.

kpi.title: KPI & Performance
kpi.subtitle: Monthly targets, attainment tracking, and leaderboard
kpi.noKpiTargets: No KPI targets this month — open to configure
kpi.attainmentHigh: Most tracked employees are at or above plan.
kpi.attainmentMed: Mixed attainment — review outliers on the KPI page.
kpi.kpiSnapshotDesc: Roll-up from the same signals as the main HR dashboard.
kpi.onlyDraftActiveEditable: Only draft or active targets can be edited.
kpi.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

insights.title: HR Insights
insights.subtitle: Decision surface for workforce health, KPIs, and HR throughput — open detail only when you need depth.
insights.rosterMixDesc: Active vs on leave vs exited.
insights.priorityActionsDesc: Queues and risks that usually block HR throughput.
insights.allClear: All clear — no immediate actions needed.

workforce.title: Workforce intelligence
workforce.desc: Automations, risk flags, and workforce health signals.

health.title: HR operations health
health.desc: Automation runs, SLA posture, and platform task load.

kpi.title: KPIs & performance
kpi.previewEmpty: No KPI targets this month — open to configure

filters.searchEmployees: Search name, role, department, nationality, emp#...

employees.noEmployeesSearch: Try adjusting your search or filters
employees.noEmployeesFirst: Add your first employee using the button above

omanisation.title: Omanisation Progress
omanisation.belowTarget: Below Omanisation target. Consider hiring {{count}} more Omani nationals.

departments.noDeptsDesc: Go to Departments & Positions to create departments, then assign employees.

myTeam.title: My Team
myTeam.subtitle: Manage your company's staff — add, edit, and track your entire workforce

emptyState.noMatchSub: Try adjusting your search or filters.
emptyState.noStaffSub: Start building your team by adding your first staff member. It only takes a minute.

labels.workPermitVisaDesc: Saves to your employee record and compliance views (Work Permits, expiry reminders). Add the MOL certificate file later under Compliance → Work Permits if you need it in the document vault.

offboardDialog.title: Confirm Offboarding
offboardDialog.body: This will mark the staff member as Terminated. Their record will be preserved for payroll and compliance history. You can reactivate them at any time.

clearAllDialog.title: Permanently Delete All Employees
clearAllDialog.warning: ⚠️ This is a destructive, irreversible action
clearAllDialog.bullet1: All employee records for this company will be permanently deleted
clearAllDialog.bullet2: All linked attendance, payroll, leave, and document data will be removed
clearAllDialog.bullet3: This action cannot be undone — there is no recovery
clearAllDialog.bullet4: Only use this in a test or sandbox environment

payroll.title: Payroll Records
payroll.empty: No payroll records for this year

documents.title: Employee Documents
documents.uploadNote: Upload work permit, passport, visa, ID card and more
documents.noUploadsYet: No files uploaded yet. Use Document Vault to add passport, visa, civil ID, and other documents.
documents.openVaultHint: Upload and manage files in the full vault.

lifecycle.notFound: Employee not found or access denied.
